## Checklist

* [ ] The pull request title is a good summary of the changes — it is used in the changelog
* [ ] Unit tests for the changes exist and pass locally (`make test` / `uv run pytest`)
* [ ] All pre-commit hooks pass (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
* [ ] A changelog fragment has been added (`changelog.d/<id>.<type>.md`) or the PR has the `skip-changelog` label
* [ ] Documentation reflects the changes where applicable
